data.title: Resolutions passed by Vopak’s Annual General Meeting
data.description: At the Annual General Meeting in Rotterdam, Netherlands on April 22, 2026, Koninklijke Vopak N.V. (Royal Vopak) approved the following resolutions.
AT&T Reports Strong First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results

data.title: Chatham Financial to Acquire Hodes Weill & Associates To Provide Comprehensive Capital Markets Solutions to Real Assets Managers
data.description: Chatham Financial, a major independent capital markets advisor, has revealed its plans to acquire Hodes Weill & Associates, a prominent global capital advisory firm specializing in real estate, infrastructure, and other real assets. The acquisition marks a significant step for Chatham, known for providing expert advice and innovative technology solutions to help organizations manage risk and capitalize on opportunities. This strategic move aims to combine the strengths of both firms, creating a comprehensive offering in the global market.

data.title: Netradyne Achieves ISO 42001 AI Management System Certification with Zero Non-Conformities
data.description: Netradyne, based in San Diego, proudly confirmed the successful completion of its inaugural ISO 42001 Artificial Intelligence Management System (AIMS) certification audit. This achievement signifies the company's commitment to implementing high standards in artificial intelligence practices.

data.title: Nextdoor Opens Dallas Office, Plans to Grow DFW Team Substantially in 2026
data.description: Nextdoor, the neighborhood network platform, has inaugurated its Dallas office, marking its fifth office location in the US alongside SF, NYC, LA, and Chicago. This Texas hub signifies a targeted expansion effort with established executive leadership in the city. Commencing with a team of 15 employees, Nextdoor aims to increase its workforce to 30-40 members by the summer of 2026 in Dallas, signifying a significant step in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Kvika banki hf.: Kvika issues inaugural SEK 300 million AT1 notes
data.description: Today, Kvika has completed the issuance of Additional Tier 1 (AT1) notes, a crucial part of the Bank's capital optimization strategy outlined with its year-end results in February. This marks Kvika's inaugural issuance of AT1 notes, signaling a significant achievement for the Bank as it continues to expand and enhance profitability. The oversubscribed issuance was well received by investors in Scandinavia, reaffirming confidence in the Bank's growth trajectory.
Results are in: record-low unemployment rate at 3.8%, with 250,000 new jobs added last month.
SOUTH KOREA TO ENCOURAGE PUBLIC PARTICIPATION IN FIVE-DAY CAR ROTATION SCHEME WITH AUTO INSURANCE DISCOUNTS FROM MAY -REPORTS

data.title: Taboola to Announce First Quarter Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Taboola, a key player in providing advertisers with performance at scale globally, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6. The announcement will be made by the company listed on Nasdaq as TBLA. A conference call and webcast has been scheduled by the management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial results.

data.title: Amaze Announces Launch of Amaze Live as Its Next-Generation Multi-Channel Live Shopping Platform
data.description: Amaze Live introduces a new way for creators and brands to conduct live sales across various platforms, without being restricted to just one. This revolutionary approach allows for seamless selling across multiple channels, providing flexibility and reach to a wider audience. The platform enables users to connect and engage with customers effortlessly, enhancing sales opportunities and maximizing revenue potential. Through Amaze Live, creators and brands can tap into a diverse range of audiences, boosting their visibility and generating more sales. This innovative solution transforms the live selling experience, showcasing a user-friendly interface and empowering users to expand their business horizons. Join the Amaze Live community today and revolutionize your live selling strategy.

data.title: EnviroGold Advances Greens Creek Project Toward Commercial Validation with Arrival of Feedstock for Pilot and Demonstration Campaigns
data.description: EnviroGold has made progress in commercializing the NVRO Process, with Greens Creek tailings reaching Australia for validation testing. This step marks a significant development in the project, with key numbers including the large amount of tailings from Greens Creek being processed, the advancements towards full-scale implementation of the NVRO Process, and the demonstration of its viability on both pilot and commercial scales. The successful validation testing will further solidify EnviroGold's efforts in environmentally friendly mining practices.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin's Ongoing Share Repurchases Achieved Nearly RMB958 Million in 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, KANZHUN LIMITED ("BOSS Zhipin" or the "Company") disclosed its share repurchase initiative, having spent RMB27.2 million to buy back 579,118 ordinary shares on April 21. In the current fiscal year of 2026, the Company has already utilized close to RMB958 million for repurchasing shares, reflecting its dedication to enhancing shareholder returns. The Company's shares are listed as Nasdaq: BZ and HK: 2076.

data.title: Wabtec Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) announced their first quarter 2026 financial results. GAAP earnings per diluted share were $2.12, marking a 12.8% increase from the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted earnings per diluted share stood at $2.71, showcasing an 18.9% rise compared to the same quarter last year. The company reported first quarter sales of $2.95 billion and generated $199 million in cash from operations. Wabtec expressed satisfaction with their strong performance in early 2026, attributing it to effective execution across their business segments resulting in double-digit growth in sales and adjusted EPS.

data.title: $3.5M exploit hits Sui-based Volo Protocol, leading to frozen assets and ongoing fund recovery efforts after hack.
data.description: Volo Protocol recently announced the occurrence of a $3.5 million exploit impacting specific vaults. The company has taken immediate action by freezing assets and initiating the process of recovering the funds. Investigations into the incident are currently ongoing.

data.title: Danske Mortgage Bank Plc to release Interim Report for H1 2026 on specified date.
data.description: More than 10,000 people in the city were affected by a recent power outage that lasted for over 12 hours. The outage was caused by a damaged transformer near the main power station. Residents in the affected areas were left without electricity during the night, with temperatures dropping below freezing. Emergency services responded to over 50 calls related to the outage, including requests for medical assistance and reports of suspicious activity. Local officials have apologized for the inconvenience and assured residents that steps are being taken to prevent similar outages in the future.
